prompt_text:
### Demographics: 44-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 51.8 kg; Height 158.9 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 7.7%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 198mg/dL; 9 months ago 207mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 51.8kg; 9 months ago 50.9kg; 6 months ago 49.3kg; 3 months ago 48.8kg; current 51.8kg), Height (12 months ago 158.9cm; 9 months ago 158.9cm; 6 months ago 158.9cm; 3 months ago 158.9cm; current 158.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 68mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 63U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 100U/L; 9 months ago 105U/L; 6 months ago 92U/L; 3 months ago 98U/L; current 103U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 255mg/g; 9 months ago 393mg/g; 6 months ago 410mg/g; 3 months ago 439mg/g; current 278mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 165mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.26 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
